source_pr.title: executor: speedup unit tests by spliting them into separate suites
source_pr.body: ### What problem does this PR solve? Speed up unit tests of executor package. ### What is changed and how it works? - reduce sleep time - https://github.com/pingcap/check/pull/10 enables us to run tests in different suites parallelly, so split tests in executor package into 4 suites, and each suite contains 60 tests in average. The execution time is reduced from `24s` to `8~10s` on my laptop. - some tests cannot run parallelly, such as tests using gofail, put them into seqtest directory and run them sequentially; - some tests call `Exec(select query)` without calling `rs.Close()`, thus leading to goroutine leak, so change them to newly added function `ExecNoRes` which closes result set. ### Check List Tests N/A Code changes N/A Side effects N/A Related changes N/A --- This change is [](https://reviewable.io/reviews/pingcap/tidb/8618)
